exchanges.prompt: Design an AWS serverless API with API Gateway, Lambda functions, DynamoDB for data, and S3 for file storage

response.content:
architecture-beta
  group cloud(cloud)[Cloud]
  service api(aws:api-gateway)[API Gateway] in cloud
  service lambda(aws:lambda)[Lambda Function] in cloud
  service dynamodb(aws:dynamodb)[DynamoDB] in cloud
  service s3(aws:s3)[S3 Bucket] in cloud
  api --> lambda:Invoke
  lambda --> dynamodb:CRUD
  lambda --> s3:Read/Write
  dynamodb --> lambda:Data
  s3 --> lambda:File
  api --> s3:Proxy
